name: Q6550677
abstract: Lincoln Goines (born 1953) is a double bassist and bass guitarist from Oakland, California.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Blue Note 50th Anniversary Concert

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Valentin
about_quotes.evidence: Oh I’d say just being with this band for such a long time. Bill O’Connell, Robby Ameen, Lincoln Goines and Milton Cardona.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Valentin interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 15, 2000

about_quotes.speaker: Bobby Militello
about_quotes.evidence: which in a lot of circumstances, Lincoln Goines or any of the cats are in the band well that’s a selling point.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bobby Militello interviewed by Monk Rowe, Buffalo, New York, October 14, 2002
